titleStmt.title: SII 40.358: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 358. (A.R. No. 30 of 1934.) Vaḷaiyāttūr, Walajapet Taluk, North Arcot District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vaḷavanāthēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1[460], Vikāri, Āśvija, śu. 5.
Records the gift of the village Ālambaguḍi to the temple of Vaḷava-Nāyinār in the village Vaḷavanāṭūr by a certain Bayyapa Nāyaniṅgāru, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1460 Agunēṭi vikāri sa
ṁvatsara Āśīja śu 5 lu śrī¨rmamahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Acyutadēvama
hārāyalu prithivi sāṁbrājyamusēyu¨rcuUṁḍaṁgānu bayapanāyaniṁgāru va nāṭūri vaḷavanayi vāri
niri nakulaku yiccina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ Acyuta svāmi Acyutadēvarāyaladha
¨rmmamuṁgānu mī Ūri vaḷavanayivāri guḍivaḷa vetu dapiṁce
dānikiṁnni māku cellē sīmavaḷiyatūrilōniki cellē Ālaṁbaguḍi grāmaṁ voka Univaḷavanayi vāriki caṁdra
sū¨ryadulu kalakālamu cellaṁgaladi yī dhaṁ¨rmaniki yavarokaṁḍu Āhitaṁ dalaṁcinānu gaṁ
gadharini kapilaĀḍunu caṁpina dōṣālanu tamatallini taṁḍrini jaṁpina dōṣānapōṁgalavāruyani yiccina dhaṁ¨rmma
śāsanamu bhairava .
Digital edition of SII 40.358 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
